description: Ablation 'is it the gate alone?': imperative PySpark + structural dry-run gate ONLY -- no SDP, no safety skill. Each proposal is screened by a paradigm-agnostic structural analysis pass (analyze-only, no executors, ~8s, $0) before execute, but the agent writes plain pyspark.sql with no declarative structure. Isolates the contribution of the gate. pre-reg §3 Arm B2.
